# OpenTelemetry aiohttp server Integration

{{ pypi }}

This library allows tracing HTTP requests made by the
[aiohttp server](https://docs.aiohttp.org/en/stable/server.html) library.

## Installation

```
pip install opentelemetry-instrumentation-aiohttp-server
```

## References

- [OpenTelemetry Project](https://opentelemetry.io/)
- [aiohttp client Tracing](https://docs.aiohttp.org/en/stable/tracing_reference.html)
- [OpenTelemetry Python Examples](https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-python/tree/main/docs/examples)

functions.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server.get_default_span_details
documentation:
Default implementation for get_default_span_details
Args:
    request: the request object itself.
Returns:
    a tuple of the span name, and any attributes to attach to the span.

functions.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server._get_view_func
documentation:
Returns the name of the request handler.
Args:
    request: the request object itself.
Returns:
    a string containing the name of the handler function

functions.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server.collect_request_attributes
documentation:
Collects HTTP request attributes from the ASGI scope and returns a
dictionary to be used as span creation attributes.

functions.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server.set_status_code
documentation: Adds HTTP response attributes to span using the status_code argument.

functions.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server.middleware
documentation: Middleware for aiohttp implementing tracing logic

classes.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server.AiohttpGetter

methods.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server.AiohttpGetter.get
documentation:
Getter implementation to retrieve an HTTP header value from the ASGI
scope.

Args:
    carrier: ASGI scope object
    key: header name in scope
Returns:
    A list of all header values matching the key, or None if the key
    does not match any header.
Extract current trace from headers

classes.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server._InstrumentedApplication
documentation: Insert tracing middleware

classes.name: opentelemetry.instrumentation.aiohttp_server.AioHttpServerInstrumentor
documentation:
An instrumentor for aiohttp.web.Application

See `BaseInstrumentor`
